description_long: This is a small, decorative pedestrian bridge constructed primarily from dark brown wood, featuring a gently arched deck and vertical slat railings on both sides. The bridge has four prominent posts at each corner, each topped with a spherical finial, adding a touch of ornamentation. The deck is composed of evenly spaced wooden planks, and the railings are made up of vertical balusters with a solid lower panel. The arch of the bridge is subtle, providing a slight rise in the center for visual interest and functional water clearance. The overall design is compact and symmetrical, suitable for parks, gardens, or small urban green spaces. The bridge's style is traditional, with a focus on simple, clean lines and practical construction.
description: A small, arched wooden pedestrian bridge with vertical slat railings and decorative post finials, finished in dark brown. The design is traditional and compact, ideal for parks or garden settings.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full arch, both railings, and all four decorative post finials.
description_view_1: End-on view highlighting the entrance, width, and the symmetry of the railings and posts.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0, with the arch and railings clearly visible.
description_view_3: Reverse end-on view, showing the exit and the alignment of the posts and railings.
attribute_railing_design: wooden vertical slats with solid lower panels and spherical post finials
